line 

VALUES: B = Buccal — the surface of the tooth which is closest to the cheek. 
D = Distal — the surface of the tooth facing away from an invisible line drawn vertically through the 
center of the face. 
F = Facial — the surface of a tooth that is directed towards the face. 
I = Incisal — the cutting edges of the anterior teeth. 
L = Lingual — the surface of the tooth that is directed towards the tongue. 
M = Mesial — the surface of a tooth which faces toward an invisible line drawn
